top_signals.title: AI Adoption in supply chain nears peak hype, exec warns
top_signals.summary:
Redwood's chief innovation officer says AI adoption in supply chain is approaching Gartner's Peak of Inflated Expectations, with a reckoning close behind.

top_signals.title: Google Gemini CLI abused as a hacking agent, malware botnet operator
top_signals.summary: A Russian-speaking threat actor known as "bandcampro" used Google's open-source Gemini CLI AI tool as a hacking agent and to operate a small-scale botnet. [...]

top_signals.title: Why Jim Cramer is shocked by Citi's against-the-grain praise of Microsoft's Copilot
top_signals.summary: Jim Cramer said on CNBC on Wednesday that Citi's optimism is contrary to everything he has been hearing about Copilot being subpar.
